title: Drone Technology Engineer
description: A Drone Technology Engineer in India designs, develops, and tests drone systems for various applications such as surveillance, mapping, and delivery. They work with software, hardware, and mechanical components to ensure the drones are safe, efficient, and meet customer requirements. They also collaborate with teams to integrate drone technology with other systems and technologies.
degree_name: Bachelor of Engineering in Aeronautical Engineering
top_private_colleges: SRM Institute of Science and Technology

career_progression.year_0_2: Internships with drone manufacturers and startups, basic programming and software skills development
career_progression.year_3_5: Design and development of drone systems, integration with other technologies, and project management
career_progression.year_6_10: Senior design and development roles, leadership positions, and entrepreneurship
career_progression.entrepreneurship_exit: Starting a drone manufacturing or services company, or creating a drone-based startup
career_progression.global_pathway: Opportunities in the US, Europe, and the Middle East for Indians with expertise in drone technology

india_social_context.first_year_reality: Challenging to find internships and jobs, requires strong networking and skills development
common_misconceptions: Drone technology is only for military use
Drone engineering is a niche field
